design_philosophy: A sophisticated, immersive, and elegant dark theme inspired by premium audio brands (like Bowers & Wilkins or Devialet). Focuses on deep blacks, high-contrast vibrant CTAs (avoiding teal/purple), and bold sans-serif typography. Uses high-end dramatic studio photography aesthetic with cinematic lighting and generous negative space.

spacing_and_layout.grid_marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12 (Mode A: Tetris Grid, use asymmetry)
spacing_and_layout.grid_dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6 (Mode B: Control Room Grid, dense and aligned)
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for textual content, asymmetrical balances for marketing.

surfaces_and_components.header: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10. Must remain highly legible.
surfaces_and_components.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#111111), 1px solid border (border-white/10), no soft shadow. Technical grid look.
surfaces_and_components.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Vibrant high-contrast fill (#FF5A00). Hover lifts slightly (-translate-y-1) with increased brightness. MUST have explicit hover text color.
surfaces_and_components.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized: bg-transparent, border-white/20, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF5A00] focus:border-[#FF5A00].

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Smooth momentum scrolling for landing page.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-2px] with explicit hover text/bg color contrast. Cards subtle border color shift.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, ensure high contrast focus rings, data-testid on all interactive elements.

hero_image.description: Wide-angle cinematic dramatic studio photography of modern sleek laptops, SSD drives, and high-tech lab equipment floating elegantly. Used for Main Hero section.

feature_hardware_macro.description: Close up dramatic studio lighting of a high-end SSD and computer motherboard, cinematic shadows. Good for 'Equipamentos' or Feature spotlight.

abstract_dark_bg.description: Abstract premium dark glassmorphism background with subtle light leaks. Use for section backgrounds (like FAQ or CTA).

unsplash_laptop.description: Studio lighting laptop on desk, suitable for 'Como Funciona' or dashboard feature previews.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for the marketing Landing Page sections to allow asymmetrical bento grids and layered images.
Use Shadcn UI components for the Dashboard and Authentication flows, customizing the styling to match the dark luxury tech theme.
Ensure the hero image is not hidden by a blanket overlay; use a gradient overlay from the text side if contrast is needed. The hero photography is cinematic and must breathe.
Implement the 'Fila Inteligente' (Smart Queue) concept clearly in both copy (Portuguese) and UI flow.
Inject the provided fonts (Outfit and Manrope) via Google Fonts in the HTML head.
Use Lucide React or Phosphor Icons for iconography.
